'''namuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygopagus|pygopagus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygopagus|pygopagus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| namuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || næmivith || næmivij || næmivish || næmivi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || namumuvuth || namumuvuj || namumuvush || namumuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || namuvuth || namuvuj || namuvush || namuvu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || namufvufth || namufvufj || namufvufsh || namufvuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || namuvuthu || namuvuju || namuvushu || namuvuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || namuvuth || namuvuj || namuvush || namuvu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || namuvuthul || namuvujul || namuvushul || namuvukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || namuvuuthuthu || namuvuujuju || namuvuushushu || namuvuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || namuvuthun || namuvujun || namuvushun || namuvukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || namuvuthuoro || namuvujuoro || namuvushuoro || namuvukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
